centertext_templates: weight of your {body_part} pressing gently downward
body supported and held completely still
breath steady and slow and grounding
solid warmth beneath and around your {body_part}
the ground holding your full weight easily
steady rhythm of breath anchoring you here
body heavy and still and completely supported
slow exhale releasing into solid stillness
warmth in your {body_part} grounding each breath
each breath settling deeper into solid quiet
tts_templates: the weight of your {body_part} settles fully into the surface beneath you, supported completely, every exhale releasing a little more into that solid stillness
there is a steadiness in the rhythm of your breath, and as you notice it, your {body_part} relaxes a little more into that grounded, supported weight
your body knows exactly how to rest here, and with each slow exhale, that sense of solid, supported stillness grows deeper and more complete
the warmth spreading through your {body_part} carries with it a kind of rootedness, a quiet certainty that you are held and supported fully
with each breath, your {body_part} releases a little more into the steady, grounded warmth beneath you, held completely, needing nothing at all
